title: swida × dunbarii
intro: Swida × dunbarii, also known as Hybrid Guelder Rose, is a cross between the American and European Guelder Roses, belonging to the family of shrubs or small trees. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of anthocyanins, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds that possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Swida × dunbarii include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and alleviating symptoms of various diseases such as fever, arthritis, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Swida × dunbarii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments, and it can be consumed in the form of capsules or tablets after proper processing and standardization.
